info.name: scott-international-dashboard
info.description:
UPDATED COLLECTION — Changelog vs original scott-international collection:

• Promotions index: URL now has items=10&page=1 (original had empty ?).  
• Profit Margin index: query uses 'items' (not 'item'), added status=active filter; create/update: added status field.  
• Colors create/update: added status (active|inactive); Delete: URL fixed to colors/:id (original wrongly used authorized_brands/2).  
• Authorized Brands create/update: added description, logo_url, status, sort_order; Delete: URL fixed to authorized_brands/:id.  
• Asset Infos create/update: added name, add_on_id, status; body keys use snake_case (dx, dy, mirror_dx, asset_height_resp_to_box).  
• Customers index: query params now search, status, customer_type, zone_id, items, page (aligned with app).  
• Customers: NEW endpoint 'get by customer_code' (GET .../by_code?customer_code=).  
• Customers create: body aligned with app — customer_code, company_name, contact_person, customer_type, zone_id, status, credit_limit, payment_terms, gst, notes, distributor_ids, brand_ids, addresses with label, type, address, city_id, state_id, postal_code, is_primary.

query.description: Page size (consistent with other dashboard APIs)
